---
title: "CV"
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        <meta name="description" content="Curriculum vitae of Nicola Borri, Associate Professor of Finance and Lian Group Chair in Blockchain Technology and Fintech at Luiss University.">
        <link rel="canonical" href="https://www.nicolaborri.com/cv.html">
        <meta property="og:title" content="CV - Nicola Borri">
        <meta property="og:description" content="Curriculum vitae of Nicola Borri, Associate Professor of Finance and Lian Group Chair in Blockchain Technology and Fintech at Luiss University.">
        <meta property="og:type" content="website">
        <meta property="og:url" content="https://www.nicolaborri.com/cv.html">
---

::: {.wrapper}
::: {.main-section}

# CV

The current CV is available here:

[Download CV](assets/cv/Nicola_Borri_CV.pdf)

:::
::: {.sidenav}
{{< include _includes/sidebar.qmd >}}
:::
:::
